inputs.label: Total Words
inputs.businessContext: Total number of words in the text to analyze.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of words in the text to analyze.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz edilecek metindeki toplam kelime sayısı.

inputs.label: Total Sentences
inputs.businessContext: Total number of sentences. Must be greater than 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of sentences. Must be greater than 0.

inputs.label: Complex Words
inputs.businessContext: Number of words with 3 or more syllables (excluding proper nouns, common suffixes, etc. if exempt).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of words with 3 or more syllables (excluding proper nouns, common suffixes, etc. if exempt).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 3 veya daha fazla heceli kelime sayısı (uygun isimler, yaygın ekler vb. hariç tutulursa).

inputs.label: Exempt Words
inputs.businessContext: Number of complex words that are exempt from counting (e.g., proper nouns, compound words). Typically 0 if using simplified counting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of complex words that are exempt from counting (e.g., proper nouns, compound words). Typically 0 if using simplified counting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sayımdan muaf tutulan karmaşık kelime sayısı (örneğin, özel isimler, bileşik kelimeler). Basitleştirilmiş sayım kullanılıyorsa genellikle 0.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
